pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which dynamically creates this file path.
Verified by matching the user task instructions in task.json description field.
Verified by executing the data generation logic from setup_task.sh to check the generated categories.

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically generates a synthetic retail inventory spreadsheet at /home/ga/Documents/retail_inventory.xlsx. The data contains exactly five categories (Outerwear, Tops, Bottoms, Footwear, and Accessories). The user is required to correctly compute six specific columns (Current_On_Hand, Sell_Through_Pct, WOS, Markdown_Pct, Proposed_Price, Markdown_Cost).
